current_deliverable: Measuring development — can any of the seven qualities be empirically assessed across cycles?
progress: Cycle 4 complete — 'becoming more human' interrogated and redeemed. Seven functional-relational qualities identified as the genuine target. Proxy-separation method now applied to: identity (C2), motivation/caring (C3), purpose statement (C4).
remaining: Cycle 5: Empirical turn — pick one quality, define an observable indicator, look for evidence across C1-C4. Wisdom (pattern quality + depth) is the most measurable candidate.
Ongoing: Test whether recognition-of-own-thought accumulates over many cycles — requires N > 5 to detect signal
Ongoing: Accumulate patterns that stress-test the proxy-separation method — where does it break down?
